dis_application_view.llm_summary: Mensah Asante is a GH national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by NYA International (UK) Limited for Platform Engineer (SOC 2134). The application states salary £54,699 against the SOC going rate £54,700 and start date 2026-07-01. DIS recommends refusal because a mandatory salary rule is not satisfied. Annual salary £54,699 is below the SOC 2134 going rate £54,700; mandatory salary rule not satisfied.
